scene.message: Maki: Ah!!{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Ahh, honestly!!{nl} She got away again.{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: .........{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Damn it.{nl} It won't budge at all.{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: That child set{nl} something into that stand.{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: Ugh~{nl} We've got more to look for~?{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Hey,{nl} open up already!{waitkey}{ret}
Reiji: ...{wait_fr:60}Out of my way.{nl} I'll smash it down.{waitkey}{ret}
Reiji: ...{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Kido!{nl} That's too harsh, isn't it?!{waitkey}{ret}
The door won't budge.{waitkey}{ret}
There's a half-moon-shaped{nl} hollow.{waitkey}{ret}
